text.title: Lookalike Audiences
text.summary: Lookalike audience creation, sizing guidelines, multi-country specs, and source quality rules.

rule.statement: Use purchasers (not all website visitors) as the lookalike source — purchaser-based lookalikes consistently outperform visitor-based ones by 2-4x ROAS.
rule.rationale: Lookalike quality depends entirely on source signal quality. Visitor audiences include high bounce rates; purchaser audiences encode the intent pattern you actually want to replicate.

list.item: 1% — smallest reach, highest similarity, use for testing and high-value products
2-3% — medium reach, good quality, use for scaling proven campaigns
5-10% — largest reach, lower similarity, use for mass market awareness only

rule.statement: Test 1%, 3%, and 5% lookalikes simultaneously with equal budgets for 7 days before committing to a single size.
rule.rationale: Optimal lookalike size varies by product price point and audience depth; testing is cheaper than assuming the 1% is always best.

example.note: Multi-country lookalike creates separate similarity models per country using the same source.
